      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ †chi irr ta Sweh-
tiba/ ko tawa Kalpone mannain
Kungam irr atueſuſi/laid ta teem
Puiſcheem tohp atdohta / kas
mannam Kungam pakkatſtaiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "PEEDohD / luhdsains / ta-
wai Kalponei to Pahrkahpscha-
nu/ jo tas KUNGS darrihs tee-
ſcham mannain Kungam weenu
pastahwign Namnu / tapehz ka
mans Kungß ta KUNGA Kar-
eu wedd/ un ne kahds Launums
pee tew irr atrasts muhſcham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Zilweks kahds
pretti tew zelſees/tew wajadams/
un tawu Dwehjeli mekledams/
tad buhs mannaKunga Dwehfele
eeſeeta eekſch to Kuhlinu to Dsih-
wo/ pee ta KUNga tawaDeewa/
bet tawu Eenaidneeku Dwehfele
taps itt ka no Lingas iſlingota.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tas KUNGS
mannam Kungam wiſſu to Lab-
bn darrihs / ko wiꞥſch pahr tew
runnajs/ un pawehlehs tew pahr
Israëlu waldiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tas mannain Kun-
gam ne reebſees/ nedß par Sirds-
Gruhtumu buhs/ ka tu welti buh-
tu Affini iſlehjis / un ka mans
Kungs pats fewim buhtu palih-
dsejs/ un kad tas KUNGS man-
nam Kungam fabdarrihs / tad
peeminneſi tu tawas Kalpones.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Dahwids us
Abigäili : Slawehts laid irr tas
KUNgs tas Israëla Deews/ kas
tew ſchodeen man irr pretti fuhtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un flawehts laid irr ta
Padohms / un flwehtita effi
patti/ ka tu man ſchodeen ais
wejuſi/ ka es prett Affinim ne
mu nahzis/ ka manna patti R
ka man buhtu palihdſejſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo pateefi/ tik teefch
ka tas KUNGS tas Isra-
Deews dsihwo/ kas mann irr a
kawejs tew kann darriht /
buhtu tu steigufeeg un man p
ti nahkuſi / tad Nahbalam
buhtu atlizzinahts ktüis ſcht
paſcha Rihta ne weens / kas
Seenas meesn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme Dahwids
winnas Rohkas/ ko winna t
bij atwedduſi/ un fazzija us
Eijar Meeru atkat Mahjäs/re
es efimu tawai Balkfnet klansi
un tawu Luhgschanit pecnehn
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Abigäile pee N
bala nahze / raugi / tad tam b
Dsihres fawa Nammä/ ta v
ka Kehnixa Dsihres/ un N
bala Sirde preezajahs us ta
un wiꞥſch bija fohti apdſhre
Bet winna tam ne Wahrdus/n
masu nedß leelu lihds Rihta
kad Gaisma tappe/ fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu ta Rihta Dee
nahze/ un tas Wihne no Nah-
la nohſt blja / tad stahſtija w
na Seewa tam wiſſus ſch
Wahrdus / tad pamirre win
Sirds eekſch winna/ un win
ktüa ka Aſminis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz kahdahm defi-
Deenahm fitte tas KUNGS
Nahbalu/ ka tas nomirre.
"
    }
  ],
